hero.name: Semi Fernandez
hero.tagline: I build production systems across blockchain, frontend, and backend — and the infrastructure that keeps them running.

blockchain.title: Blockchain
blockchain.summary: EVM · Solana · TON. Multichain infrastructure, wallet integrations, gasless flows, and non-custodial payment systems. Built systems handling $1M/day in transaction volume.

frontend.title: Frontend
frontend.summary: React · Next.js · TypeScript. I translate complex transaction flows into fast, intuitive interfaces. 80s → 5s load time fix. −50% onboarding churn.

backend.title: Backend
backend.summary: Node.js · AWS (Fargate, SQS, Lambda, Aurora, DynamoDB, Redis). APIs adopted by 100+ integrating teams. End-to-end ownership from architecture to incident response.

other.title: Other
other.summary: Teaching at uDevHouse. Smart-contract security reviews. Electronics engineering background. Founder and CTO of two companies.

transparency.label: Transparency
transparency.body: I share real numbers, real tradeoffs, and real limitations. No inflated claims.

directness.label: Directness
directness.body: I say what I mean. Clear scope, honest timelines, no fluff in communication.

equality.label: Equality
equality.body: I've built for 53 countries, mentored engineers across LATAM, and I believe good software should work for everyone.

privacy.label: Privacy
privacy.body: I build non-custodial systems and avoid unnecessary data collection — in my products and in my own site.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.body: Open to new projects, collaborations, and conversations.

footer.built_with: Built with Next.js 16 · Tailwind v4 · Deployed on Vercel
